title: Serialize stack-heavy lowering tests and raise RUST_MIN_STACK

source.subject: fix(ci): serialize stack-heavy tests and raise RUST_MIN_STACK on Linux

body:
## Outcome

Serialize stack-heavy tests and raise RUST_MIN_STACK on Linux.

## Context

- Workstream **codegen-runtime** — see workstream summary on the catalog.
- Contributes to deliverable **api.json primary contract** (`v02-api-json-contract`).
